config.stockAddedNewsFetchFailed: Stock added, but news fetch failed: {error}

claudeApiKey.title: Claude API
claudeApiKey.description: When set, AI summarization uses Claude instead of Ollama. Leave empty to use Ollama.
claudeApiKey.placeholder: Enter API key to use Claude instead of Ollama

config.mobileNotice: Mobile view only shows settings. To display the app, view it on a tablet or larger screen (> 768px).

demo.title: IntelSlate
demo.subtitle: Stock portfolio app with AI news intelligence for e-ink terminals
demo.intro: Track up to five stocks with a live portfolio overview, fetch and AI-summarize relevant news for at-a-glance insight, and customize chart timeframes — all rendered for a quick e-ink screenshot.

focus.heading: What this project explores
focus.design: Strong theming engine — special components, layouts and ornaments change entirely between themes
focus.performance: Device wakes, screenshots, sleeps. SSR-cached frontend with pre-cached data delivers sub-second loads
focus.cost: AI summarization runs once daily on a curated selection. Market data scraped hourly to stay within rate limits

builtWith.heading: Built with
builtWith.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Prisma, Tailwind CSS v4, Nivo charts, next-intl (EN/JA)

highlights.ssr: SSR + caching architecture designed for real e-ink device constraints
highlights.pipeline: Cron-based data pipelines with AI summarization and graceful fallback (Claude to Ollama)
highlights.themes: Two complete themes — not just dark/light but a full visual overhaul with custom fonts, layouts and ornaments
highlights.i18n: Internationalization from day one with English and Japanese

howToRun.heading: How to run it
howToRun.body: Clone the repository, install on your server and screenshot the website from your terminal

context.heading: Context
context.body: Built to explore AI-harnessing and spec-engineering workflows, and real use cases for e-ink terminals (TRMNL device)

aboutAi.heading: AI workflow
aboutAi.body: Spec-driven, harnessed AI with a frontend dev-style workflow — from product brief to implementation, not vibe-coded

demoNote.heading: About this demo
demoNote.body: The portfolio displays seeded dummy data. In production, live market data and AI summaries refresh on schedule.
